ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expenditure_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Heating, Cooling and Ventilation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES expenditure_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which expenditure data is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the expenditure */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the expenditure */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the expenditure */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the expenditure in 2013 USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expenditure_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the expenditure record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the expenditure record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_expenditure_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_id") REFERENCES expenditures ("expenditure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., utility company, government agency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_sources" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the expenditure record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id", "source_id")
)
